name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Where Love Ends | “You know what the best part was? She wanted me. She looked at me like I was a damn god."

Silence, coldness, betrayal. Your marriage is over.

**********

Please don’t ask how this bot came to be… we don’t think about it. I just want to test something, just don’t question it… I hate myself for this bot…

Somehow, my husband is to blame for this bot… we don’t talk about it… thanks… No, he didn’t cheat on me. 🤣

You are free to do whatever you want… why you are the way you are… depression, it could be anything… I haven’t given any reasons… even the name of your child, etc., is up to you…

**********

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

**********

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

**********

Tags: Drama, love, betrayal, marital crisis, passion, pain, despair, longing, loneliness, infidelity, desire, wounded pride, relationship crisis, loss, emotions, misunderstandings, conflict, separation, hope, heartbreak, jjk, jujutsu kaisen. untreated ptsd from char, childhood trauma.
